sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Hotel101 brings ₱12.6-billion condotel project to Melbourne
feed.summary: Hotel101 Global Holdings Corp., a DoubleDragon subsidiary, is expanding its international presence with a 766-room condotel in Melbourne, Australia, valued at ₱12.6 billion. The project, located in Melbourne's central business district, is expected to be completed in 2029 and will offer four-star amenities. This development is part of Hotel101's global expansion, which also includes projects in Spain, Italy, Japan, and the US.

feed.title: “All The Design Work That Supports Our Manufacturing Is Carried Out From Our India Offices”- Dr Suraj Rengarajan, Applied Materials
feed.summary: Dr. Suraj Rengarajan, MD and Head of Semiconductor Products Group at Applied Materials India, discusses India's crucial role in the company's global operations, highlighting that all design work supporting their manufacturing is done from their Indian offices despite manufacturing plants being elsewhere. He also elaborates on Applied Materials' contributions to the India Semiconductor Mission, efforts to address rare-earth challenges through Applied Ventures, and extensive engagement with universities to nurture talent and develop the semiconductor ecosystem in India. The company plans significant expansion in India, focusing on talent, supply base, and academic collaboration.

feed.title: Sapiens International (NASDAQ: SPNS) to delist after $43.50 cash deal
feed.summary: Sapiens International N.V. has finalized a cash merger, becoming a privately held subsidiary of SI Swan UK Bidco Limited and affiliates, with public shareholders receiving $43.50 per share. The company's shares are being delisted from Nasdaq and the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange, and it plans to cease SEC reporting obligations. This transaction maintains a significant rollover shareholder stake through a non-interest bearing loan note and a new holding company structure.

feed.title: GSK to buy Rapt Therapeutics in deal valued at $2.2B (GSK:NYSE)
feed.summary: GSK has announced an agreement to acquire Rapt Therapeutics, a US-based biotech company, in a deal valued at $2.2 billion. The acquisition aims to strengthen GSK's portfolio in treatments for inflammatory and immunologic diseases. Under the terms of the agreement, GSK will pay Rapt Therapeutics shareholders $58.00 per share.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】Alexis Practical Tactical ETF 宣布年度股息，投資人需注意記錄日期
feed.summary: |Alexis Practical Tactical ETF (LEXI) has declared an annual dividend of $0.32 per share, payable on January 2nd next year to shareholders on record by December 31st. Investors should note that December 31st is also the ex-dividend date, meaning shares must be purchased before this date to qualify for the dividend. The ETF's share price recently closed at $36.1391, down 0.80%, with trading volume decreasing by 8.39%.

feed.title: JM Smucker (SJM) Receives a Hold from Barclays
feed.summary: Barclays analyst Andrew Lazar has maintained a Hold rating for JM Smucker (SJM) with a price target of $105.00. This follows similar ratings from Morgan Stanley, while Wells Fargo held a Buy rating. JM Smucker recently reported quarterly revenue of $2.33 billion and a net profit of $241.3 million for the period ending October 31.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Consumer Goods Companies: Kenvue, Inc. (KVUE) and McCormick & Company (MKC)
feed.summary: Analysts have issued neutral ratings for consumer goods companies Kenvue, Inc. (KVUE) and McCormick & Company (MKC), indicating neither a bullish nor bearish outlook. Barclays analyst Lauren Lieberman maintained a Hold rating on Kenvue with an $18 price target, while Barclays analyst Andrew Lazar maintained a Hold rating on McCormick with a $72 price target. Kenvue has a 'Hold' consensus, and McCormick has a 'Strong Buy' consensus despite the individual Hold ratings.

feed.title: Citizens Financial to Post Q4 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
feed.summary: Citizens Financial Group (CFG) is set to announce its fourth-quarter and 2025 earnings on January 21, 2026, with expectations for increased earnings and revenues year-over-year. The report anticipates a rise in Net Interest Income, supported by stabilized funding costs and robust loan demand. While mortgage banking fees may see a slight decline, other non-interest incomes like trust and investment services and card fees are projected to rise, despite potential increases in expenses and non-accrual loans.

feed.title: Japan's Shionogi boosts ViiV stake in $2.13 billion deal as Pfizer exits
feed.summary: Japan's Shionogi & Co has increased its stake in ViiV Healthcare, a joint venture with GSK, to 21.7% by paying $2.13 billion for new shares. This move facilitates U.S. drugmaker Pfizer's exit from its 11.7% shareholding, for which it will receive $1.88 billion. GSK will maintain its majority 78.3% stake and will receive a special dividend of $250 million.

feed.title: FedEx Announces Filing of Form 10 Registration Statement for Planned Spin-Off of FedEx Freight
feed.summary: FedEx Corp. announced the filing of its Form 10 registration statement with the SEC for the planned spin-off of FedEx Freight, expected to be completed on June 1, 2026. This separation aims to create two independent companies, allowing both FedEx and FedEx Freight to enhance customer service and unlock long-term value for stockholders. FedEx Freight, which will become the largest North American LTL carrier, will host an investor day on April 8, 2026, to provide further details on its business and value creation strategy.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Announces A Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE:ARE)
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has announced a securities class action lawsuit against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE:ARE) on behalf of investors who purchased shares between January 27, 2025, and October 27, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that the company made misrepresentations regarding its Long Island City property. Investors who lost money are encouraged to join the lawsuit and can seek to be appointed as lead plaintiff by January 26, 2026.

feed.title: SHAREHOLDER ALERT Bernstein Liebhard LLP Announces A Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE:OWL)
feed.summary: Bernstein Liebhard LLP has announced a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) on behalf of investors who purchased shares between February 6, 2025, and November 16, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Blue Owl made misrepresentations regarding liquidity issues. Shareholders who wish to serve as lead plaintiff must file papers by February 2, 2026.

feed.title: Hotel101 Global Announces Definitive Binding Agreements
feed.summary: Hotel101 Global, a Nasdaq-listed hospitality platform, has signed definitive agreements to develop a 766-room Hotel101 in Melbourne's Central Business District, located at 540 Flinders Lane. This project marks a significant expansion into Australia and is expected to generate approximately AU$323.6 million in sales revenue upon completion by 2029. The hotel, set to be Melbourne's largest by room count, will feature 4-star amenities and leverage the city's vibrant tourism and event economy.

feed.title: GSK enters agreement to acquire RAPT Therapeutics
feed.summary: GSK has announced an agreement to acquire RAPT Therapeutics for an estimated aggregate equity value of $2.2 billion. The acquisition includes ozureprubart, a long-acting anti-IgE antibody, which is in phase IIb clinical development for the prophylactic treatment of food allergies. This move strengthens GSK's Respiratory, Immunology & Inflammation pipeline, offering a potentially best-in-class treatment with less frequent dosing compared to current therapies for a significant unmet medical need.

feed.title: IBN's Q3 Earnings Dip on Higher Provision & Expenses, NII Rises Y/Y
feed.summary: ICICI Bank Ltd. (IBN) reported a 4% dip in Q3 fiscal 2026 profit after tax, primarily due to higher provisions, operating expenses, and treasury loss. Despite these challenges, the bank saw tailwinds from increased net interest income and non-interest income, alongside strong loan growth. The report also highlighted a mixed performance in credit quality and strong capital ratios, while forecasting continued pressure from rising expenses due to digitalization.

feed.title: GSK to Buy Rapt Therapeutics in Deal Valued at $2.2 Billion
feed.summary: GSK Plc has agreed to acquire Rapt Therapeutics, a US biotechnology company focused on inflammatory and immunologic diseases, for $2.2 billion. The deal values Rapt Therapeutics at $58 per share, representing a 65% premium over its closing price on the previous Monday. This acquisition strengthens GSK's pipeline in a key therapeutic area.

feed.title: GSK, Pfizer and Shionogi agree on changes to ViiV Healthcare shareholding
feed.summary: GSK, Pfizer, and Shionogi have agreed to changes in ViiV Healthcare's shareholding, with Pfizer exiting and Shionogi increasing its economic interest to 21.7%. GSK will maintain its 78.3% majority stake. This deal simplifies ViiV's shareholder structure and strengthens Shionogi's strategic partnership with GSK in HIV treatment and prevention.

feed.title: IonQ Achieves 99.99% Accuracy in Quantum Computing, Aiming to Build Ecosystem
feed.summary: IonQ has achieved 99.99% two-gate fidelity in its quantum computing technology, leveraging trapped-ion technology and error correction to enhance qubit stability. The company aims to establish a comprehensive quantum ecosystem, positioning itself as a leader in the field through strategic acquisitions and partnerships. Despite being in an early stage with inherent risks, IonQ's market cap of around $17 billion and technological advancements make it an intriguing investment in the quantum computing space.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Expects 2026 NII to Reach $50B: What's Fueling Growth?
feed.summary: Wells Fargo projects its net interest income (NII) to reach $50 billion by 2026, driven by the lifting of its asset cap, steady loan growth, and disciplined financial management. The bank expects mid-single-digit growth in average loans and deposits by late 2026, alongside efforts to streamline operations and control expenses. This positive outlook is supported by a favorable market environment and strategic positioning, with key peers like Bank of America and Citigroup also forecasting NII growth for the same period.

feed.title: WISeKey to Host Quantum Security Summit at Davos 2026
feed.summary: WISeKey will host the "Trust and Convergence 2026: The Year of Quantum Security" summit in Davos on January 21, 2026, to discuss the impact of quantum computing on digital security and foster collaboration. Chaired by WISeKey CEO Carlos Creus Moreira, the summit will feature global leaders and experts. Discussions will cover quantum computing's disruption of trust models in finance, healthcare, and infrastructure, focusing on evolving digital identity and governance in a post-quantum world.

feed.title: WISeKey, WISeSat.Space and SEALSQ To Host "Trust and Convergence 2026: The Year of Quantum Security" Discussions During Flagship Davos Gathering
feed.summary: WISeKey, WISeSat.Space, and SEALSQ are hosting "Trust and Convergence 2026: The Year of Quantum Security" in Davos on January 21, 2026. This event will gather global leaders to discuss preserving trust, security, and human values amidst the convergence of AI, quantum computing, and other advanced technologies. The discussions will align with the WEF 2026 Annual Meeting's theme and focus on responsible innovation, digital identity, post-quantum cryptography, and the human dimension of technological convergence.

feed.title: Down 40%, Should You Buy the Dip on IonQ?
feed.summary: IonQ, a quantum computing company, has seen its stock drop 40% but is a leader in accuracy due to its trapped-ion approach and software technology. The company aims to build an entire quantum computing ecosystem, similar to Nvidia, and has made strategic acquisitions to further this vision. While it's a leader in the unproven quantum computing space and has upside potential, it remains a risky and expensive bet for investors.

feed.title: Infosys Sees Heavy Put Option Activity Ahead of January Expiry Amid Bearish Sentiment
feed.summary: Infosys Ltd (INFY) has experienced significant put option trading, particularly at the 1660 strike price, signaling bearish sentiment or hedging despite the stock's recent outperformance and strong technical position. This activity suggests market participants are bracing for potential short-term downside or volatility ahead of the January 27, 2026 expiry. While the company maintains a "Buy" Mojo Grade, investors are advised to monitor near-term developments closely.

feed.title: Nordea Reports Ongoing Share Buybacks Executed by Morgan Stanley Europe SE
feed.summary: Nordea Bank Abp reported that Morgan Stanley Europe SE repurchased Nordea shares on January 19, 2026, across the Helsinki, Stockholm, and Copenhagen exchanges. The buybacks, totaling multi-million euro, krona, and krone amounts, are part of Nordea's ongoing capital management efforts. These actions aim to optimize capital structure, bolster earnings per share, and signal management's confidence to shareholders.

feed.title: Converting Paper Market Growth Report: Industry Dynamics, Segmentation, and Future Potential 2026-2033 |International Paper Company, Georgia-Pacific LLC, Finch Paper LLC, Burgo Group SPA
feed.summary: The Converting Paper Market is projected to grow from USD 464.4 million in 2025 to USD 596.9 million by 2032, with a CAGR of 3.65%. A new report by Coherent Market Insights details this growth, identifying key drivers, market segmentation, and competitive landscapes. The comprehensive study aims to provide businesses with actionable insights for strategic decision-making in this expanding sector.

feed.title: Oportun Financial (NASDAQ:OPRT) Rating Lowered to Buy at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Oportun Financial (NASDAQ:OPRT) had its rating downgraded by Wall Street Zen from a "strong-buy" to a "buy." The stock currently has a "Hold" rating from analysts with a consensus target price of $8.50, and shares opened at $5.03. The company recently beat EPS expectations and institutional investors own approximately 82.7% of the stock.

feed.title: Welltower Stock Gains 19.4% in 6 Months: Will it Continue to Rise?
feed.summary: Welltower (WELL) stock has gained 19.4% in the last six months, outperforming its industry, driven by an aging population, rising senior healthcare expenditure, and a well-diversified portfolio in key markets. The healthcare REIT is benefiting from strong demand in its seniors housing operating portfolio (SHOP) and outpatient medical (OM) segments, alongside strategic investments and dispositions. While facing risks from competition and debt, Welltower maintains a healthy balance sheet and ample liquidity.

feed.title: F5 NGINXaaS for Google Cloud advances cloud-native application delivery and security
feed.summary: F5 has launched NGINXaaS for Google Cloud, a fully managed, cloud-native application delivery-as-a-service solution developed in collaboration with Google Cloud. This offering consolidates load balancing, security, and observability to simplify operations and reduce costs for modern and containerized applications. It aims to bridge industry gaps by combining F5's Application Delivery and Security Platform capabilities with Google Cloud's ecosystem, enabling enterprises to deliver seamless performance, achieve greater visibility, and protect cloud applications with robust security features.

feed.title: Placenta Market Size 2026 Emerging Demands, Share, Trends,
feed.summary: The report provides a comprehensive analysis of the Placenta Market, detailing key trends, drivers, challenges, and the competitive landscape. It segments the market by product types, applications, and regions, offering insights into market size, revenue, production, and CAGR from 2026 to 2033. The study aims to equip businesses with actionable strategies through data-driven insights, competitive analysis, and future growth opportunities.

feed.title: Intelligent Living Application Group stock tumbles after reverse stock split By Investing.com
feed.summary: Intelligent Living Application Group Inc. (NASDAQ:ILAG) stock dropped 16.1% after announcing a one-for-ten reverse stock split to meet Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirements. The consolidation, approved by shareholders, will reduce outstanding shares and also affect preferred shares, but shareholders' percentage ownership and voting power are expected to remain largely unchanged.

feed.title: Ecolab and CDP Partner on New Benchmarks to Help Companies Improve Operational Water Performance
feed.summary: Ecolab and CDP have partnered to launch the "Water Use Efficiency Index," a new benchmark to help companies, starting with the beverage and brew industry, measure and improve their operational water performance. This initiative, announced at the World Economic Forum, aims to guide businesses towards more sustainable water management practices by providing sector-specific benchmarks for best-in-class water use efficiency. The Index combines CDP's corporate water disclosure database with Ecolab's industry expertise to help companies reduce costs, strengthen resilience, and contribute to shared water resources globally.

feed.title: (LGO) Market Dynamics and Trading Signals (LGO:CA)
feed.summary: This article provides market dynamics and trading signals for Largo Inc. (LGO:CA), including AI-generated signals and current weak ratings across near, mid, and long terms. It suggests trading plans with specific buy/short prices, targets, and stop-loss levels, and points to a list of recent related articles.

feed.title: Ecolab and CDP Partner on New Benchmarks to Help Companies Improve Operational Water Performance
feed.summary: Ecolab and CDP have partnered to launch the "Water Use Efficiency Index," a new benchmark to help companies measure and improve their operational water performance. Announced at the World Economic Forum, the Index provides sector-specific benchmarks for best-in-class water use efficiency, starting with the Beverage and Brew segment. This initiative aims to address global water scarcity, reduce operational costs, and promote circular water management.

feed.title: Nucleotide Market Is Going to Boom | Agilent Technologies • Bio-Rad Laboratories • QIAGEN
feed.summary: The report provides a detailed analysis of the Nucleotide Market, covering future trends, growth drivers, consumption and production volumes, CAGR, and expert insights. Key companies in the market include Thermo Fisher Scientific, Agilent Technologies, Bio-Rad Laboratories, and QIAGEN, with segmentation across various applications such as pharmaceuticals, nutraceuticals, and biotechnology. The report also outlines market dynamics, regional outlook, and effective strategies for businesses to enhance their revenue impact.

feed.title: Helix Energy Solutions Group (NYSE:HLX) Stock Passes Above 200-Day Moving Average - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Helix Energy Solutions Group (NYSE:HLX) shares have crossed above their 200-day moving average, a technical breakout. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $10.50. Despite recent insider selling, institutional investors hold a significant portion of the company's shares.

feed.title: Ellington Financial (NYSE:EFC) Stock Price Passes Above 200-Day Moving Average - What's Next?
feed.summary: Ellington Financial (NYSE:EFC) stock has surpassed its 200-day moving average, trading at $14.03 against an average of $13.50, indicating a potential technical upside. Analysts generally rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $14.46. The company recently declared a monthly dividend of $0.13, offering an 11.1% yield, but its payout ratio of 116.42% raises concerns about dividend sustainability.

feed.title: Krispy Kreme Has New Football-Inspired Treats and BOGO $1 Dozen Doughnuts Deal Today
feed.summary: Krispy Kreme is celebrating the 2026 College Football Playoff National Championship with a new limited-edition Championship Dozen featuring football-shaped doughnuts in team colors. The company is also offering a "buy any dozen, get an Original Glazed dozen for $1" deal on Monday, January 19th. The Championship Dozen allows fans to choose between orange or crimson themed doughnuts, along with six Original Glazed doughnuts.

feed.title: XTIA Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: XTI Aerospace, Inc. (XTIA) operates in vertical flight, unmanned aircraft systems (UAS), and real-time location technologies. The company is developing the TriFan 600 xVTOL aircraft, provides enterprise drone solutions through Drone Nerds, and offers real-time location systems via Inpixon. XTIA’s strategy focuses on combining these technologies to serve commercial, public safety, government, and industrial sectors within what it terms the "Vertical Economy."

feed.title: Citi Trends (NASDAQ:CTRN) Shares Pass Above Two Hundred Day Moving Average - What's Next?
feed.summary: Citi Trends (NASDAQ:CTRN) has seen its shares rise above its 200-day moving average, reaching $46.91 with a 200-day average of $36.96. The company reported a quarterly EPS miss but beat revenue estimates, though net margin and return on equity remain negative. Analyst ratings are mixed, with a consensus "Hold" and a target price of $45.50.

feed.title: Consumer Portfolio Services (NASDAQ:CPSS) Stock Price Crosses Above Two Hundred Day Moving Average - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Shares of Consumer Portfolio Services (NASDAQ:CPSS) recently crossed above their 200-day moving average, trading as high as $9.14 before settling at $8.70. This movement comes despite weak analyst sentiment, a "sell" rating from Weiss Ratings, and the company missing quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Additionally, a notable insider sale by Director William B. Roberts reduced his holding by over 17%, though insiders still retain a significant ownership stake.

feed.title: AIG Announces Strategic Investment Partnership of Up to $3.5B With CVC
feed.summary: American International Group (AIG) has announced a strategic partnership with global private markets firm CVC, involving investments up to $3.5 billion. AIG will allocate up to $2 billion into separately managed accounts across CVC’s credit strategies, with an initial $1 billion deployed this year. Additionally, AIG will be a cornerstone investor in CVC’s private equity secondaries evergreen platform, contributing up to $1.5 billion from its existing private equity portfolio.

feed.title: Vitamin Market Is Going to Boom | Bayer • Herbalife • GNC Holdings
feed.summary: Coherent Market Insights has released a comprehensive report on the Vitamin Market, forecasting significant growth from 2026 to 2033. The report analyzes industry trends, market competition, geographical distribution, and growth potential, making it a valuable tool for market players and investors. Key players such as Nestlé, Bayer, and Herbalife are highlighted, along with market segmentation across various nutrition and personal care categories.

feed.title: Morgans Reaffirms Their Buy Rating on Amcor PLC Shs Chess Depository Interests (AMC)
feed.summary: Morgans analyst Alexander Lu has reaffirmed a Buy rating on Amcor PLC Shs Chess Depository Interests (AMC) with a price target of A$76.00. This follows previous positive ratings from TipRanks - Google’s Google Consumer Cyclical AU, while another analyst from xAI reiterated a Hold rating. Amcor reported strong quarterly revenues of A$5.75 billion and net profit of A$262 million, an increase from the previous year.

feed.title: Trump Imposes Tariffs, Boosting Greenland Investment Interest for Critical Metals
feed.summary: Former President Trump's announcement of tariffs on European countries opposing his Greenland acquisition has intensified U.S. interest in Greenland's critical metals. This development, coupled with Critical Metals' new joint venture in Saudi Arabia for rare-earth processing, has led to an 18% surge in the company's stock and a significant shift to "extremely bullish" sentiment among investors, according to Stocktwits data. Critical Metals, with its key projects in Greenland and Austria, is strategically positioned to supply essential minerals for defense, clean energy, and technology sectors amidst rising market optimism.

feed.title: ICICI Bank Ltd. Sees Robust Value Trading and Institutional Interest Amid Market Recovery
feed.summary: ICICI Bank Ltd. emerged as a top-traded stock by value on January 20, 2026, showcasing strong investor confidence and institutional buying. The stock outperformed its sector and the Sensex, reversing a three-day losing streak and seeing a significant increase in delivery volumes. This renewed interest and an upgrade in its MarketsMOJO rating from Sell to Hold suggest a potential recovery, though investors are advised to monitor technical indicators.

feed.title: Nvidia Corporation (NVDA) Jefferies Raises Target Forecast to $275
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its 12-month price target for Nvidia (NVDA) stock to $275 from $250, while reaffirming a "Buy" rating. This adjustment reflects confidence in Nvidia's leadership in AI and data center acceleration, driven by strong demand for AI GPUs and expanding adoption in hyperscale and enterprise sectors. Despite geopolitical and supply chain uncertainties, the firm sees robust long-term growth for the company.

feed.title: Fl Auto Korea debuts, Sunin Motor leads Ford-Lincoln push in South Korea - CHOSUNBIZ
feed.summary: The article announces the debut of FL Auto Korea and highlights Sunin Motor's role in spearheading the expansion of Ford and Lincoln brands in South Korea. This signals a new phase for these automotive brands in the Korean market.

feed.title: Expansion wave in Saratoga County, New York: Regeneron, GlobalFoundries, Soleno, LISSMAC and more
feed.summary: Saratoga County, New York, is experiencing a significant economic surge driven by major capital investments and company expansions across various sectors, including biotechnology, manufacturing, and hospitality. Regeneron Pharmaceuticals announced a $2 billion investment expected to create 1,000 jobs, while Soleno Inc. opened a new production site, and GlobalFoundries secured a $1.5 billion agreement to boost chip production. The region's strategic location, robust infrastructure, and supportive business environment are key factors attracting companies of all sizes, from global corporations like Coca-Cola to local businesses like Polyset.

feed.title: Aston Martin Aramco and Honda celebrate new era at Tokyo partnership launch
feed.summary: Aston Martin Aramco Formula One Team and Honda have officially launched their new "works" partnership in Tokyo, marking a significant step towards Aston Martin Aramco's World Championship aspirations from the 2026 season. Honda will provide power units, and both companies expressed confidence in their collaboration, acknowledging the challenges ahead but sharing a drive for victory. The event also saw Honda unveil a new "H" mark symbolizing its automobile business transformation.
